doc.question: Today is 05/17/2008. What is the date 14 days from now in MM/DD/YYYY?

arguments:
<bos><|turn>system
Always end your response with: The answer is <your answer>.<turn|>
<|turn>user
2015 is coming in 36 hours. What is the date one week from today in MM/DD/YYYY?<turn|>
<|turn>model
2015 come in 36 hour. That 2 day. 01/01/2015 minus 2 day = 12/30/2014. Then +7 day = 01/05/2015. The answer is 01/05/2015.<turn|>
<|turn>user
The first day of 2019 is a Tuesday, and today is the first Monday of 2019. What is the date today in MM/DD/YYYY?<turn|>
<|turn>model
2019 start Tuesday. First Monday come 6 day later. 01/07/2019. The answer is 01/07/2019.<turn|>
<|turn>user
The concert was scheduled to be on 06/01/1943, but was delayed by one day to today. What is the date 10 days ago in MM/DD/YYYY?<turn|>
<|turn>model
06/01/1943 + 1 day = 06/02/1943. 10 day before = 05/23/1943. The answer is 05/23/1943.<turn|>
<|turn>user
It is 4/19/1969 today. What is the date 24 hours later in MM/DD/YYYY?<turn|>
<|turn>model
04/19/1969 + 1 day = 04/20/1969. The answer is 04/20/1969.<turn|>
<|turn>user
Jane thought today is 3/11/2002, but today is in fact Mar 12, which is 1 day later. What is the date 24 hours later in MM/DD/YYYY?<turn|>
<|turn>model
03/11/2002 wrong. Real day 03/12/2002. +1 day = 03/13/2002. The answer is 03/13/2002.<turn|>
<|turn>user

<|turn>model
02/28/2001 born. 16 year birthday = 02/28/2017. Yesterday = 02/27/2017. The answer is 02/27/2017.<turn|>
<|turn>user
